title: How do I connect to NUwave-guest with a username and password?
plain_text: NUwave-guest is an open-access, unsecured wireless network that is available in all Northeastern buildings and residence halls. It is intended for those who are visiting Northeastern University and need temporary internet access. This article describes how to connect to NUwave-guest after registering for a guest account. Connect to NUwave-guest: 1. Connect to NUwave-guest from the list of available networks. You will be directed to the login page. 2. Enter the username and password of your guest wireless account. 3. Select 'Log In'. 4. You will be granted 30 days of access to NUwave-guest, and once it expires, you will have to re-register for continued access.
body_html:
NUwave-guest is an open-access, unsecured wireless network that is available in all Northeastern buildings and residence halls. It is intended for those who are visiting Northeastern University and need temporary internet access. This article describes how to connect to NUwave-guest after registering for a guest account.

Connect to NUwave-guest

  • Connect to NUwave-guest from the list of available networks. You will be directed to the login page.
  • Enter the username and password of your guest wireless account.
  • Select 'Log In'.
  • You will be granted 30 days of access to NUwave-guest, and once it expires, you will have to re-register for continued access.

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: NUwave-guest is an open-access, unsecured wireless network that is available in all Northeastern buildings and residence halls. It is intended for those who are visiting Northeastern University and need temporary internet access. This article describes how to connect to NUwave-guest after registering for a guest account.

sections.heading: Connect to NUwave-guest
steps: Connect to NUwave-guest from the list of available networks. You will be directed to the login page.
Enter the username and password of your guest wireless account.
You will be granted 30 days of access to NUwave-guest, and once it expires, you will have to re-register for continued access.
